metadata.description: Elixir and BEAM ecosystem development tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: elixir
plugins.description: Essential Elixir development support with hooks and automation

plugins.name: phoenix
plugins.description: Phoenix framework patterns, LiveView, and UI component skills

plugins.name: elixir-workflows
plugins.description: Elixir development workflow plugin with planning, QA, reference commands, and interactive context gathering

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Language-agnostic LLM-based code quality gate — blocks untracked TODOs, unmarked deferred work, stub functions, and silent workarounds

plugins.name: staged-review
plugins.description: Two-tier code review workflow — pre-commit single-reviewer triage (code-review), post-commit/post-merge dual-reviewer audit (audit-review with mandatory parallel Codex + Claude+Codex dialogue; absorbs bot-comment triage, Linear close-out, acceptance-criteria verification). Pre-merge is GitHub-native auto-merge (gh pr merge --auto). Fully autonomous post-merge chain.

plugins.name: task-driver
plugins.description: Roadmap-driven task execution — select tasks by efficiency, implement with TODO tracking, update all project documentation

plugins.name: portfolio-strategy
plugins.description: Power-law portfolio rule — cross-repo decision framework for starting, continuing, or killing projects. Classify normal vs power-law bets, check portfolio health, enforce kill criteria

plugins.name: cloud-delegation
plugins.description: Linear-as-queue + cloud-agent (Codex, Cursor) delegation workflow — issue creation, polling, push-back-vs-fix matrix, agent env constraints (hex.pm, mix tasks, Tidewave, HTTP)

plugins.name: dev-lifecycle
plugins.description: Canonical reference for the five-phase development lifecycle — task-driver(1) → worktree(2) → bots(3) → merge(4: GH-native gh pr merge --auto) → audit-review(5). Composes the task-driver, staged-review, and cloud-delegation plugins into one named chain. Pure documentation/orchestration; language-agnostic; standalone-extractable.

plugins.name: marketplace-hygiene
plugins.description: Marketplace-integrity hooks: blocks direct edits to auto-synced SKILL.md files (redirecting to the canonical ~/.claude/includes/*.md source via the shared scripts/skill-include-map.sh), and validates marketplace/plugin/hooks JSON on every edit so parse errors surface immediately. Self-contained, no plugin-internal dependencies.
